sys_script_include.description:
This Script was designed to load the form preferences for any task 2.8.3 | 2023-07-08 | raj | DFCT0011870 - Task Form Preferences is NOT following "User in Top OU" field 2.8.x | 2023-05-17 | raj | DFCT0011862 - Form Preferences is Not working In the table where you can put rules and a different view of the task opens for that rule 2.8.1 | 2022-10-17 |raj | STRY0127550 - Tech Debt - Task Types are used in code with hard coded values, modify to use a new value field in the table
2.8 | 2022-07-24 - raj - DFCT0011036 - "Change View to Quick Task Form" or "Change view to Advanced Task Form" does NOT change the Task Form View 2.8 | 2022-06-21 - raj - STRY0116257 - System Setting- Options for limiting available views and setting default "Task Form view" for New Task Forms 2.8 | 2022-05-11 | raj | STRY0119569 - New Task Form- Form Selector
2.7.3 | 2022-05-17 | raj | DFCT0010933 - FNS System Down - Cannot open tasks if Tasker Portal is not the default portal
2.7.2 | 2021-01-13 | raj | DFCT0010755 - "Task Form Preferences" is NOT immediately loading the preferences unless the user logs out/resets their session 2.7.2 | 2021-01-11 | raj | STRY0114645 - Base Task Form- Make the "Simple" Task Form the new "Standard" Task Form
DFCT0010708 - Form Customization - Email Notification Links does not recognize the Form Preferences when it loads the form
sys_script_include.name: tasker_User_Form_Preferences
